Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Dorothy Schefer Faux fashion collection
Faux, Dorothy Schefer.
8572
24 cubic feet.
1931-2019 Publications, printed materials, photographs, and video tapes and reel to reel recordings. Collection offers a depth of material related to fashion design in the later half of the 20th century with most dating from the 1990 to 2016. Collection material in English 9687378
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
May 2017
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, March 2017
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, October 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Dorothy Schefer Faux, Cornell University Class of 1969, is a former senior editor of Vogue, an author, and entrepreneur.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Collection offers a depth of material related to fashion design in the later half of the 20th century with most dating from the 1990 to 2016. Material in the collection consists of lookbooks, Visionaires, designer interviews, VHS tapes and other media, and other publications and books related to fashion. Also includes newspaper articles, magazines and flyers collected by Faux documenting her experience at Cornell in 1969.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Look books
Series II. Trend reports
a. Vogue trend reports b. Other trend reports
Series III. Event publications
a. Bonnie Cashin: designer's season descriptions and/or illustrations b. Exhibit Catalogs c. Various event publications
Series IV. Fashion Publications
a. Books b. Visionaire c. Fashion and Various Other Periodicals
Series V. Promotional materials and fashion show invitations
a. Promotional materials b. Fashion show invitations
Series VI. Designer interviews
a. Binder A b. Binder B
Series VII. Media
a. Videos b. Tape recordings c. Records
Cite As:
Dorothy Schefer Faux Fashion Collection, #8572. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Processing Information:
Series in this guide were created based on original cataloging of the collection before it arrived in the RMC - lookbooks, trend reports, exhibit and other event publications, books, Visionaires, and promotional material were all grouped together and the majority of the individual items were numbered and those numbers were kept. Videos were renumbered according to RMC rules but the original numbers appear in the notes field as a reference.
Later additions (after Box 24) were placed into corresponding series but unless they were media, the items were not individually numbered.
Restrictions on Use:
Audio visual media that has been digitized: V-9679
Restrictions on Use:
Due to the fragility and potential degradataion of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Divison of Rare and Manuscript webpage.

Scope and Contents
Now in binders, originally stapled packets, these written materials were handed out to buyers at the opening presentation of each season's new design line, by Bonnie Cashin.
